import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import'./ArticleGrid.css';// Grid pagination component with gold frames - Shows 10 articles per page
import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ArticleGrid=_ref=>{let{articles}=_ref;const navigate=useNavigate();const[currentPage,setCurrentPage]=useState(1);const articlesPerPage=10;// Calculate pagination
const totalPages=Math.ceil(articles.length/articlesPerPage);const startIndex=(currentPage-1)*articlesPerPage;const endIndex=startIndex+articlesPerPage;const currentArticles=articles.slice(startIndex,endIndex);const handleArticleClick=id=>{navigate(`/article/${id}`);};const handleNextPage=()=>{if(currentPage<totalPages){setCurrentPage(currentPage+1);// Scroll page to top
window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});}};const handlePrevPage=()=>{if(currentPage>1){setCurrentPage(currentPage-1);// Scroll page to top
window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"article-carousel-section",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"articles-grid",children:currentArticles.map(article=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid-article-item",onClick:()=>handleArticleClick(article.id),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"article-image-wrapper",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:article.image,alt:article.title,className:"article-grid-image",loading:"lazy",draggable:"false"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"article-overlay",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"overlay-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"overlay-title",children:article.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"overlay-category",children:article.category})]})})]})},article.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pagination-controls",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"pagination-btn prev-btn",onClick:handlePrevPage,disabled:currentPage===1,"aria-label":"Previous page",children:"\u2190 Previous"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"pagination-info",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"page-indicator",children:["Page ",currentPage," of ",totalPages]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"pagination-btn next-btn",onClick:handleNextPage,disabled:currentPage===totalPages,"aria-label":"Next page",children:"Next \u2192"})]})]});};export default ArticleGrid;
